ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth for age calculation */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the measurement belongs */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month when the measurement was taken */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the measurement was taken */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in cm */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight in kg */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_body_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the analytics are calculated */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the user over their recorded measurements */,
  "average_bust" REAL /* Average bust measurement of the user */,
  "average_waist" REAL /* Average waist measurement of the user */,
  "average_hips" REAL /* Average hips measurement of the user */,
  "progress_trend" TEXT /* Progress trend based on the user's measurements (e.g., increasing, decreasing, steady) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the goal is set */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., weight loss, increase bust measurement) */,
  "goal_value" REAL /* Target value for the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date by which the goal should be achieved */,
  "goal_status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, achieved, missed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal being tracked */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the metric being measured */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the current value was recorded */,
  "progress_note" TEXT /* Additional note or comment about the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES user_goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback from the system administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status of the notification (read/unread) */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., goal achievement, measurement reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Personalized recommendation for the user */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
